scenarios.description: children() returns empty Elements when no child nodes exist (childNodeSize==0)
scenarios.precondition: Create an Element with no children; childNodes is EmptyNodeList

scenarios.description: children() returns one-element Elements when exactly one Element child exists
scenarios.precondition: Element el has one Element child appended via appendChild
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list contains exactly that one child element

scenarios.description: children() filters out non-Element nodes and returns only Element children
scenarios.precondition: Element el has mixed children: TextNode, two Element children, Comment via appendChild; uses real implementations
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list contains exactly the two Element children in original order
pseudocode: TEST TC03 children mixed node types
assert result.size() == 2 && result.get(0) == c1 && result.get(1) == c2;

scenarios.description: children() returns unmodifiable Elements list independent of later child modifications
scenarios.precondition: Element parent has two child Elements; use real objects; after calling children(), modify parent by appending another child
scenarios.expectedResult: original Elements result remains size 2 and does not include appended third child
pseudocode: assert snapshot.size() == 2 && snapshot.get(0) == c1 && snapshot.get(1) == c2;
